title: RFE: log whether or not podman is running in rootless mode upon invocation
body:
**kind feature**

**Description**

log whether or not podman is running in rootless mode upon invocation..

I think something like this would help debugging a lot when users report issues:

```
$ podman run foo
-> podman is running rootless as user foobar
$ sudo podman foo
-> podman is running as root
```

This is just an idea. Feel free to close if not useful.

comments.body: I think an info-level log about this would be a very good idea
Well we don't want this going to the screen by default.
podman info and podman version should probably output it though.
i think the log level would need to be enabled to have it come on screen.
